name: DraftKings Inc.
summary: DraftKings Inc. is a digital sports entertainment and gaming company offering online and retail sports betting (Sportsbook), online casino (iGaming), daily fantasy sports (DFS), digital lottery courier, and prediction markets. Sportsbook and iGaming accounted for 93% of revenues in fiscal 2025. The company generated $6,054.5 million in revenue for fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with 4.0 million average monthly unique payers and $53.6 billion in Sportsbook Handle.

products.name: Sportsbook
products.description: Online and retail sports betting platform where users wager money on events at fixed odds set by DraftKings.

products.name: iGaming
products.description: Online casino offering blackjack, roulette, baccarat, and slot machines, generating revenue through hold against the house.

products.name: Daily Fantasy Sports (DFS)
products.description: Peer-to-peer fantasy sports contests including Pick6, where revenue is the difference between entry fees and prize payouts.

products.name: Digital Lottery Courier
products.description: Facilitates purchase of official state lottery tickets via mobile app or website, earning service fees and commissions.

products.name: DraftKings Predictions
products.description: Prediction markets app launched December 19, 2025, allowing customers to trade on real-world outcomes under CFTC oversight.

partnerships.description: Licenses casino game content for DraftKings iGaming product offering under revenue-sharing agreements.
